title: ?author= filter is exact-match only
evidence: src/app.ts:52 — SELECT * FROM books WHERE author = ? (no LIKE / case-insensitive matching)
suggestion: Consider partial or case-insensitive matching if broader author search is desired; not required by spec

title: PUT requires full body (title+author), no PATCH semantics
evidence: src/app.ts:72 — PUT rejects with 400 if title or author absent, replacing all fields
suggestion: Behavior is spec-conformant; a PATCH route for partial updates would be a nice-to-have

title: No numeric validation on year / isbn format
evidence: src/app.ts:34 — year/isbn accepted as-is with no type or format checks
suggestion: Spec only mandates title/author validation; optional field validation could harden input
